meta.description: Admin-configurable schedule visibility and privacy controls for role-based schedule details.

userGroups.label: Supervisor
userGroups.description: Can view supervised employees and operational staffing details.

userGroups.label: Scheduling Supervisor
userGroups.description: Can view full schedule detail and cross-shift staffing queues.

userGroups.label: Manager
userGroups.description: Can view management-level summaries and sensitive exceptions.

userGroups.label: Administrator
userGroups.description: Can view and configure all schedule visibility policies.

scheduleVisibilityRules.description: Employees can see that supervisors are working and the total hours, but not exact times.
Employees can see whether peers are working or off without exact schedule detail.
Supervisors can see full schedule detail for managed employees.
Managers can see broad staffing detail across groups.
Admins can view and edit all visibility policy detail.

displayExamples.hidden: None, unless agency marks notes admin-only

displayExamples.output: Full schedule, leave type, time, note, and policy reason

adminControls: Configure schedule visibility by viewer group and target group.
Choose full times, hours only, working/off only, or hidden.
Configure leave type visibility separately from schedule visibility.
Mark sensitive leave types as off-only or hidden for employee views.
Allow admin and scheduling supervisors to override visibility for operational need.
Audit every policy change with actor, timestamp, old value, and new value.
rules: Privacy policies must be role/group based, not hard-coded to a single agency.
Employee-facing views should never expose admin-only notes.
Sensitive leave labels can be hidden while still preserving coverage accuracy.
Higher authority roles may see more detail when authorized by agency policy.
Visibility policies affect display only; underlying schedule and coverage calculations still use full data.
